The number of students per county in 2005 is:  
Aiken 136, Bamberg 11, Barnwell 29, Berkeley 524, Calhoun 11, Cherokee 19, Chesterfield 29, Colleton 41.  

Sorting these values: 11, 11, 19, 29, 29, 41, 136, 524.  
The median is the average of the 4th and 5th values: (29 + 29) / 2 = 29.  

\boxed{29}
